calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case ordered dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Proceedings reported by Joann Prior. (212) Notice sent by Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2003 Continued To Sep-03-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in propria persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/3/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Beldon Yee. (212)
